Your System Design roundup is here

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис, we made some major updates to one of our most popular courses.

FEATURED COURSE

Master GitHub Copilot

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVVx8d1s_HF-W5zY9H995myNLW74N_GZ5N5Ld8N15bQY63prCCW95jsWP6lZ3kGW49t6my2RRRTmN10d5nBBzFrPW8hC8jN1_-QqBW1mzNTW5LFNNDVx12jT6SjH81W79VrxH6lWMkpW3zbLHN2CF--YW2JLZMC5y1wFvW4zTVRw3WQQjSW7_zWZp6dJ-9BW2HV_Hj2JQg6GN54TSYBDyxGJW85xYqh3wbqVmW3N7hlF2hyrjpW4Lf68H9h-L3JVKngLN1Hw_w3W4LGlnQ1HPgtfW2ry_904JgZXkW8_xbkn3Y61LLW4zsglv68McrzW6DJNPw18T0XnN8GkPMCSpwkXN82DBryn2sLsN25mjVgj9fhTN53dgwWnY3w_W8PCBn27qngmlW3vs52K4mwT1TV-Cdzm103xlLW8ZrnKK3VFFYyW4wjVHQ2s7gBqf1Ldy8d04 )

Learn GitHub Copilot foundations through hands-on lessons: explore AI-assisted coding, Copilot chat, prompt engineering, code reviews, testing, and debugging to incorporate AI into your workflows.

Also included in your Educative membership is access to The Educative Newsletter. Here's this week's topic:

THIS WEEK'S NEWSLETTER

Inside the System Design of GitHub Codespaces

Read Newsletter → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVVx8d1s_HF-W5zY9H995myNLW74N_GZ5N5Ld8N15bQXR5m_5PW8wM7ks6lZ3pSW6vMY5Y5rG5TtW7Kqrky7t6qm4W65HPxj5B99WsW3qPr8d4K2fPdW1RJ-7n7nPh6-W5c1BGK2kzdT5W8rTJQ925bXlVW96wQ2g53gB48W95bsw43n8MstW73GG336r5HxYVbrWsg5qfSsZW1Y9WRw45TfpFW5j_kyR4ZRkRZW5W6KPk64DPmTW5RZ05L308xvSW9gwZ742KZSYBW8rQ9bJ8pBD_7F708P3Y5RdxW8vnFhB5KxfmHVzSR4f55HBmlW7s0BZ22B7PLYVjsvPM67ShvsW68MNMT2ND0PBW2p2fhf8128wKW6cS3Cj4nFvwvW2wdn-03wbRzQVTBHzl5_CZ2lW7hVSHl8vbRGjW5Yf9Bx97G8RzW5XHSKm7ZfP5LW4604Jm10ZsB7MKY08BVMQ-MW7PQ25R8H9GCSW8fDkY087rxHpW5Lp8Lq3sQsZxW2BSfjQ3FF3JrW1011Db80ngMPW26Rs_f3_6-TvN3yXCQf27j3lW6sDr2Z88XMPlW43N8NW3mybfyW8mjYH95wrRcWW2Mc23f46CW_MW2Y06SJ2cFc3kf6jV1g004 )

GitHub Codespaces solves the “works on my machine” issue with standardized, cloud-based environments that make developers productive in minutes. Using Azure, a hybrid VM-container model, and a client-server split of VS Code, it provides secure, scalable, responsive development.

Learn on the Go
